title.en: A small recovering West African mining economy
title.zh: 一个正在恢复中的西非小型矿业经济体

desc.en: Sierra Leone is a small coastal economy whose role is shaped by mining and the continuing effort to turn stabilization into broader resilience.
desc.zh: 塞拉利昂是一个小型沿海经济体，其角色由矿业以及把稳定化继续转化为更广韧性的努力共同塑造。

title.en: Iron ore, rubber, and small open coastal economy
title.zh: 铁矿石、橡胶与小型开放沿海经济体

desc.en: Liberia relies on iron ore, rubber, and external trade links, while its narrow domestic base keeps the economy vulnerable to outside shocks.
desc.zh: 利比里亚依靠铁矿石、橡胶和对外贸易联系运转，但其狭窄的国内基础使经济容易受到外部冲击。

title.en: A small West African export economy tied to commodities and maritime openness
title.zh: 一个与大宗商品和海洋开放性紧密相连的西非小型出口经济体

desc.en: Liberia is a small coastal economy whose role is shaped by mineral exports, plantation agriculture, and a high degree of outward economic dependence.
desc.zh: 利比里亚是一个小型沿海经济体，其角色由矿产出口、种植园农业以及较高的对外依赖度共同塑造。

title.en: Trade, remittances, and fragile private-sector economy
title.zh: 贸易、侨汇与脆弱型私人部门经济体

desc.en: Somalia relies on trade, remittances, livestock, and private commercial resilience, while aid dependence and insecurity continue to narrow the wider economic base.
desc.zh: 索马里依靠贸易、侨汇、牲畜出口和私人商业韧性运转，但援助依赖与不安全仍然压缩着更广的经济基础。

title.en: A fragile Horn of Africa trade-and-remittance economy
title.zh: 一个脆弱的非洲之角贸易与侨汇经济体

desc.en: Somalia is a commercially resilient but institutionally fragile economy whose role is shaped by remittances, ports, trade networks, and chronic vulnerability.
desc.zh: 索马里是一个商业韧性较强但制度基础脆弱的经济体，其角色由侨汇、港口、贸易网络和长期脆弱性共同塑造。

title.en: Agriculture, limited services, and macro-strained inland economy
title.zh: 农业、有限服务业与宏观承压的内陆经济体

desc.en: Burundi relies on agriculture and a narrow services base, while inflation, fuel shortages, and external imbalances continue to weigh heavily on the economy.
desc.zh: 布隆迪依靠农业和狭窄的服务业基础运转，但通胀、燃料短缺和外部失衡持续沉重压在经济之上。

title.en: A highly constrained inland East African agrarian economy
title.zh: 一个高度受约束的东非内陆农业经济体

desc.en: Burundi is a small inland economy whose role is shaped by agriculture, chronic macroeconomic pressure, and the difficulty of broadening a very narrow productive base.
desc.zh: 布隆迪是一个小型内陆经济体，其角色由农业、长期宏观压力以及扩大极窄生产基础的困难共同塑造。

title.en: Oil-fiscal dependence and fragile inland state economy
title.zh: 石油财政依赖与脆弱型内陆国家经济

desc.en: South Sudan relies overwhelmingly on oil revenues, while weak institutions and repeated disruptions keep the broader economy narrow and unstable.
desc.zh: 南苏丹高度依赖石油收入，而薄弱制度和反复中断持续使更广泛的经济基础保持狭窄且不稳定。

title.en: A fragile oil-dependent inland economy
title.zh: 一个脆弱的石油依赖型内陆经济体

desc.en: South Sudan is a landlocked economy whose role is shaped by oil, fiscal fragility, and the difficulty of building state capacity beyond a narrow extractive base.
desc.zh: 南苏丹是一个内陆经济体，其角色由石油、财政脆弱性以及超越狭窄采掘基础去建立国家能力的困难共同塑造。

title.en: Agriculture, oil, and mixed anchor economy
title.zh: 农业、石油与混合型锚定经济体

desc.en: Cameroon relies on agriculture, services, and a still-relevant oil layer, giving it a broader and more balanced structure than many central African peers.
desc.zh: 喀麦隆依靠农业、服务业以及仍有分量的石油层运转，这使它比许多中非邻国拥有更宽、更均衡的结构。

title.en: One of central Africa's most mixed and organized economies
title.zh: 中非最具混合性和组织性的经济体之一

desc.en: Cameroon is a relatively diversified economy whose role is shaped by its broader base, regional importance, and stronger national economic organization.
desc.zh: 喀麦隆是一个相对多元的经济体，其角色由更宽的基础、区域重要性以及较强的全国经济组织能力共同塑造。

title.en: Copper, cobalt, and fragmented giant resource economy
title.zh: 铜、钴与碎裂型巨大资源经济体

desc.en: The DRC relies on copper, cobalt, and large-scale mining, but conflict and weak national integration continue to limit broad-based development.
desc.zh: 刚果（金）依靠铜、钴和大规模矿业运转，但冲突和国家整合薄弱持续限制着更广泛的发展。

title.en: A globally strategic but weakly integrated central African mining economy
title.zh: 一个具有全球战略意义但整合薄弱的中非矿业经济体

desc.en: The DRC is one of the world's most important mineral economies, but its role is shaped as much by fragmentation and conflict as by resource scale.
desc.zh: 刚果（金）是全球最重要的矿产经济体之一，但它的角色不仅由资源体量决定，也深受断裂和冲突影响。

title.en: Oil, narrow scale, and limited diversification economy
title.zh: 石油、狭窄体量与有限多元化经济体

desc.en: The Republic of the Congo relies on oil, while modest gains in agriculture and manufacturing have not yet produced a broad or job-rich economy.
desc.zh: 刚果共和国依靠石油运转，而农业和制造业的有限改善还没有形成一个宽厚、能创造足够就业的经济。

title.en: A small central African oil state searching for diversification
title.zh: 一个正在寻找多元化路径的中非小型石油国家

desc.en: The Republic of the Congo is a coastal oil economy whose role is still defined by hydrocarbons, even as it tries to widen its non-oil base.
desc.zh: 刚果共和国是一个沿海石油经济体，其角色至今仍由油气定义，尽管它正在努力扩大非油基础。

title.en: Oil, manganese, and weak-linkage urban resource economy
title.zh: 石油、锰与连接薄弱的城市化资源经济体

desc.en: Gabon relies on oil, manganese, and wood, but weak domestic linkages and limited job creation keep the broader economy thinner than its export wealth suggests.
desc.zh: 加蓬依靠石油、锰和木材运转，但国内联系薄弱和就业创造不足，使整体经济比其出口财富所显示的更薄。

title.en: A small but wealthy-looking central African commodity economy
title.zh: 一个看起来较富、但高度集中于商品出口的中非经济体

desc.en: Gabon is a resource-rich and highly urbanized economy whose role is shaped by export concentration rather than broad-based domestic dynamism.
desc.zh: 加蓬是一个资源丰富、城市化程度高的经济体，其角色更多由出口集中度塑造，而不是由宽广的国内活力定义。

title.en: Agriculture, aid dependence, and fragile inland survival economy
title.zh: 农业、援助依赖与脆弱型内陆生存经济体

desc.en: The Central African Republic relies on agriculture and external support, while insecurity and extremely weak state capacity keep the broader economy narrow and fragile.
desc.zh: 中非共和国依靠农业和外部支持运转，而不安全与极弱的国家能力使整体经济始终狭窄且脆弱。

title.en: One of central Africa's most fragile inland economies
title.zh: 中非最脆弱的内陆经济体之一

desc.en: The Central African Republic is a landlocked economy whose role is shaped by survival, aid dependence, and the difficulty of building even a minimally stable productive base.
desc.zh: 中非共和国是一个内陆经济体，其角色由生存压力、援助依赖以及建立最低限度稳定生产基础的困难共同塑造。

title.en: Oil-fiscal, agriculture, and Sahelian inland economy
title.zh: 石油财政、农业与萨赫勒内陆经济体

desc.en: Chad relies on oil for fiscal weight, but agriculture and pastoralism still underpin livelihoods while inland and Sahelian constraints keep development narrow.
desc.zh: 乍得依靠石油维持财政分量，但农业和牧业仍然支撑着生计，而内陆与萨赫勒约束使发展空间始终偏窄。

title.en: A pressured Sahelian oil-fiscal state
title.zh: 一个承压运行的萨赫勒石油财政国家

desc.en: Chad is a landlocked economy whose role is shaped by oil revenues, rural fragility, and the difficulty of building wider capacity under severe structural pressure.
desc.zh: 乍得是一个内陆经济体，其角色由石油收入、农村脆弱性以及在沉重结构压力下建立更广国家能力的困难共同塑造。

title.en: Ports, gas potential, and coastal corridor economy
title.zh: 港口、天然气潜力与沿海走廊经济体

desc.en: Mozambique relies on coastal access, corridor links, agriculture, and gas potential, while fiscal and political strains continue to hold back broader transformation.
desc.zh: 莫桑比克依靠沿海通道、走廊联系、农业和天然气潜力运转，但财政和政治压力仍然拖住更广泛的升级。

title.en: A strategic Southern African coastal economy with unfinished gas promise
title.zh: 一个具有未完成天然气前景的战略性南部非洲沿海经济体

desc.en: Mozambique is a coastal gateway economy whose role is shaped by ports, geography, and major gas potential that remains important but not yet fully realized.
desc.zh: 莫桑比克是一个沿海门户经济体，其角色由港口、地理位置和重要但尚未完全兑现的天然气潜力共同塑造。

title.en: Diamonds, fiscal prudence, and high-governance resource economy
title.zh: 钻石、财政审慎与高治理资源经济体

desc.en: Botswana relies on diamonds, strong fiscal management, and institutional stability, while diversification remains incomplete.
desc.zh: 博茨瓦纳依靠钻石、较强的财政管理和制度稳定性运转，但多元化仍未完成。

title.en: A high-governance diamond economy under structural pressure
title.zh: 一个在结构压力下运行的高治理钻石经济体

desc.en: Botswana is a small resource-rich economy whose role is shaped by diamonds and strong institutions, but increasingly challenged by changes in the global diamond market.
desc.zh: 博茨瓦纳是一个资源丰富的小型经济体，其角色由钻石和较强制度塑造，但正越来越受到全球钻石市场变化的挑战。

title.en: Minerals, ports, and stable small-scale resource economy
title.zh: 矿产、港口与稳定型小规模资源经济体

desc.en: Namibia relies on minerals, Atlantic access, tourism, and relative institutional stability, while unemployment and limited scale constrain broader transformation.
desc.zh: 纳米比亚依靠矿产、大西洋通道、旅游和相对稳定的制度运转，但失业和体量有限限制了更广的升级。

title.en: A stable Southern African resource-and-port economy
title.zh: 一个稳定的南部非洲资源与港口经济体

desc.en: Namibia is a small but strategically positioned economy whose role is shaped by minerals, Walvis Bay, and institutional continuity.
desc.zh: 纳米比亚是一个体量不大但位置具有战略性的经济体，其角色由矿产、沃尔维斯湾和制度连续性共同塑造。

title.en: Agriculture, mining, and instability-constrained inland economy
title.zh: 农业、矿业与受不稳定约束的内陆经济体

desc.en: Zimbabwe relies on agriculture, mining, and a still-relevant industrial legacy, while macroeconomic instability continues to limit durable recovery.
desc.zh: 津巴布韦依靠农业、矿业和仍有分量的工业遗产运转，但宏观不稳定持续限制着持久恢复。

title.en: A productive but unstable Southern African economy
title.zh: 一个有生产潜力但长期不稳定的南部非洲经济体

desc.en: Zimbabwe is an inland economy with real agricultural and mining strength, but its role is shaped just as much by repeated instability as by productive potential.
desc.zh: 津巴布韦是一个拥有真实农业和矿业实力的内陆经济体，但其角色同样深受反复不稳定影响。

title.en: Agriculture, mining, and island mixed economy
title.zh: 农业、矿业与岛屿混合经济体

desc.en: Madagascar relies on agriculture, mining, textiles, and tourism, but low productivity and climate vulnerability continue to limit broader transformation.
desc.zh: 马达加斯加依靠农业、矿业、纺织和旅游运转，但低生产率和气候脆弱性仍然限制着更广泛的升级。

title.en: A large Indian Ocean island economy tied to Southern Africa
title.zh: 一个与南部非洲相连的大型印度洋岛屿经济体

desc.en: Madagascar is a large island economy whose role is shaped by agriculture, export commodities, and its SADC linkage rather than by mainland corridor geography.
desc.zh: 马达加斯加是一个大型岛屿经济体，其角色由农业、出口商品和 SADC 联系塑造，而不是由大陆走廊地理决定。

title.en: Dependence, textiles, water, and South Africa-linked economy
title.zh: 依赖型、纺织、水资源与南非嵌入型经济体

desc.en: Lesotho relies on textiles, services, remittances, water exports, and deep economic linkage with South Africa.
desc.zh: 莱索托依靠纺织、服务业、侨汇、水资源出口以及与南非的深度经济联系运转。

title.en: A small enclave economy embedded in South Africa's system
title.zh: 一个深度嵌入南非体系的小型飞地经济体

desc.en: Lesotho is a small mountainous economy whose role is shaped less by domestic scale than by its structural dependence on South Africa.
desc.zh: 莱索托是一个小型山地经济体，其角色更多由对南非的结构性依赖塑造，而不是由自身市场规模决定。

title.en: Manufacturing, SACU revenue, and South Africa-linked small economy
title.zh: 制造业、SACU 收入与南非连接型小经济体

desc.en: Eswatini relies on manufacturing, services, agriculture, and revenue linkages tied closely to the regional customs and South African economic system.
desc.zh: 斯威士兰依靠制造业、服务业、农业以及与区域关税体系和南非经济紧密相连的收入结构运转。

title.en: A small Southern African economy inside the South African orbit
title.zh: 一个处在南非经济轨道内的小型南部非洲经济体

desc.en: Eswatini is a small but somewhat diversified economy whose role is shaped by its deep integration with South Africa and SACU rather than by independent scale.
desc.zh: 斯威士兰是一个小型但比想象中更有一些多样性的经济体，其角色主要由对南非和 SACU 的深度嵌入塑造。

title.en: Mining, strategic location, and tightly controlled small economy
title.zh: 矿业、战略位置与高度管控的小型经济体

desc.en: Eritrea relies on mining and its Red Sea position, while strong state control and limited openness keep the broader economy narrow.
desc.zh: 厄立特里亚依靠矿业和红海位置运转，但强国家控制和开放度有限使整体经济基础偏窄。

title.en: A small strategic Horn of Africa economy
title.zh: 一个具有战略意义的非洲之角小型经济体

desc.en: Eritrea is a small economy whose role is shaped more by strategic location and state structure than by market scale.
desc.zh: 厄立特里亚是一个小型经济体，其角色更多由战略位置和国家结构塑造，而不是由市场规模决定。

title.en: Oil, gas, and highly concentrated small resource economy
title.zh: 石油、天然气与高度集中的小型资源经济体

desc.en: Equatorial Guinea relies overwhelmingly on hydrocarbons, while diversification remains weak and the domestic economy remains thin.
desc.zh: 赤道几内亚高度依赖油气，而多元化仍然薄弱，国内经济基础也依然偏薄。

title.en: A small hydrocarbon-heavy Central African state
title.zh: 一个油气色彩极重的中非小型国家

desc.en: Equatorial Guinea is a resource-rich but highly concentrated economy whose role is still defined mainly by oil and gas.
desc.zh: 赤道几内亚是一个资源丰富但高度集中的经济体，其角色至今仍主要由石油和天然气定义。

title.en: Cashew, agriculture, and fragile small export economy
title.zh: 腰果、农业与脆弱型小型出口经济体

desc.en: Guinea-Bissau relies heavily on cashew exports and agriculture, while diversification and institutional depth remain weak.
desc.zh: 几内亚比绍高度依赖腰果出口和农业，而多元化和制度厚度仍然薄弱。

title.en: A small West African cashew-export economy
title.zh: 一个小型的西非腰果出口经济体

desc.en: Guinea-Bissau is a small, low-income economy whose role is shaped by agricultural export concentration and political fragility.
desc.zh: 几内亚比绍是一个低收入小经济体，其角色由农业出口集中度和政治脆弱性共同塑造。

title.en: Phosphates, fisheries, and disputed-territory economy
title.zh: 磷酸盐、渔业与争议领土经济体

desc.en: Western Sahara's economic relevance is shaped mainly by phosphates, fisheries, and its disputed political status rather than by a broad domestic base.
desc.zh: 西撒哈拉的经济意义主要由磷酸盐、渔业以及其争议性的政治地位塑造，而不是由宽广的国内经济基础决定。

title.en: A disputed resource territory in North-West Africa
title.zh: 一个位于西北非的争议型资源领土

desc.en: Western Sahara is best treated as a disputed political-economic space whose importance comes from territory, sovereignty, and a narrow resource base.
desc.zh: 西撒哈拉更适合被理解为一个由领土、主权争议和狭窄资源基础共同定义的特殊政治经济空间。

title.en: Livestock, remittances, trade, and Berbera corridor economy
title.zh: 牲畜、侨汇、贸易与柏培拉走廊经济体

desc.en: Somaliland's economic role is built on livestock exports, remittances, trade networks, and Berbera's port significance.
desc.zh: 索马里兰的经济角色建立在牲畜出口、侨汇、贸易网络以及柏培拉港的重要性之上。

title.en: A de facto Horn of Africa port-and-livestock economy
title.zh: 一个事实运作的非洲之角港口与牲畜经济体

desc.en: Somaliland is best treated as a commercially resilient but politically atypical Horn of Africa economic space.
desc.zh: 索马里兰更适合被理解为一个商业韧性较强、但政治地位特殊的非洲之角经济空间。

title.en: Tourism, finance, and island service economy
title.zh: 旅游、金融与岛屿服务经济体

desc.en: Mauritius relies on tourism, financial services, trade, and institutional stability rather than on raw commodity dependence.
desc.zh: 毛里求斯依靠旅游、金融服务、贸易和制度稳定性运转，而不是依赖原始商品出口。

title.en: A high-performing Indian Ocean service economy
title.zh: 一个表现较强的印度洋服务型经济体

desc.en: Mauritius is a small but advanced island economy whose role is shaped by services, tourism, and financial depth.
desc.zh: 毛里求斯是一个小型但较成熟的岛屿经济体，其角色由服务业、旅游和金融深度共同塑造。

title.en: Remittances, consumption, and fragile island economy
title.zh: 侨汇、消费与脆弱型岛屿经济体

desc.en: Comoros relies on remittances, consumption, public investment, and a narrow island base, while diversification remains limited.
desc.zh: 科摩罗依靠侨汇、消费、公共投资和狭窄的岛屿经济基础运转，而多元化仍然有限。

title.en: A small fragile Indian Ocean island economy
title.zh: 一个小型而脆弱的印度洋岛屿经济体

desc.en: Comoros is a small island economy whose role is shaped by fragility, import dependence, and limited diversification more than by scale or strategic depth.
desc.zh: 科摩罗是一个小型岛屿经济体，其角色更多由脆弱性、进口依赖和多元化不足塑造，而不是由规模或战略深度决定。

title.en: Reform, industry, and large domestic-market post-Soviet economy
title.zh: 改革、产业与大内需型后苏联经济体

desc.en: Uzbekistan relies on domestic scale, reform, industry, agriculture, and remittance-supported demand, while its market transition remains ongoing.
desc.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦依靠国内市场体量、改革、工业、农业和侨汇支撑的需求运转，而其市场转型仍在进行中。

title.en: A reforming large-market economy in Central Asia
title.zh: 一个正在改革中的中亚大市场经济体

desc.en: Uzbekistan is one of Central Asia's most important transition economies, shaped by domestic scale, reform momentum, and a broader productive base than many of its neighbors.
desc.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦是中亚最重要的转型经济体之一，其角色由国内体量、改革动能以及比许多邻国更宽的生产基础共同塑造。

title.en: Gas, state control, and closed post-Soviet hydrocarbon economy
title.zh: 天然气、国家控制与封闭型后苏联油气经济体

desc.en: Turkmenistan relies on natural gas and strong administrative control, while non-hydrocarbon sectors remain weak and openness limited.
desc.zh: 土库曼斯坦依靠天然气和强行政控制运转，而非油气部门仍然偏弱、开放度也有限。

title.en: A closed Central Asian gas economy
title.zh: 一个封闭型中亚天然气经济体

desc.en: Turkmenistan is one of the most hydrocarbon-centered economies in Central Asia, with its role shaped by gas exports, state dominance, and limited diversification.
desc.zh: 土库曼斯坦是中亚最典型的油气中心型经济体之一，其角色由天然气出口、国家主导和多元化不足共同塑造。

title.en: Gold exports
title.zh: 黄金出口

desc.en: Gold dominates merchandise exports, making output and revenue highly dependent on global commodity prices.
desc.zh: 黄金主导商品出口，产出与收入高度依赖国际大宗商品价格。

title.en: Remittances
title.zh: 侨汇收入

desc.en: Migrant remittances, mainly from Russia, form a major share of household income and support domestic consumption.
desc.zh: 主要来自俄罗斯的移民侨汇构成家庭收入的重要来源，支撑国内消费。

title.en: Relatively open market structure
title.zh: 相对开放的市场结构

desc.en: Kyrgyzstan maintains a more open trade and market orientation than several regional peers, supporting cross-border commerce.
desc.zh: 吉尔吉斯斯坦比区域内多数同类国家保持更开放的贸易和市场取向，支持跨境商业活动。

title.en: Limited scale and external dependence
title.zh: 体量有限与外部依赖

desc.en: As a small landlocked economy, Kyrgyzstan faces persistent constraints from narrow domestic capacity and dependence on external partners.
desc.zh: 作为小型内陆经济体，吉尔吉斯斯坦长期面临国内能力有限和依赖外部伙伴的约束。

title.en: A small Central Asian gold-and-remittance economy
title.zh: 一个小型中亚黄金与侨汇经济体

desc.en: Kyrgyzstan is a small inland post-Soviet economy whose role is shaped by mineral exports, migrant income, and a more market-oriented profile than some regional peers.
desc.zh: 吉尔吉斯斯坦是一个小型内陆后苏联经济体，其角色由矿产出口、移民收入以及比部分区域同类国家更偏市场化的取向共同塑造。

title.en: Remittances
title.zh: 侨汇收入

desc.en: Migrant remittances, primarily from Russia, are the largest source of household income and a key driver of domestic demand.
desc.zh: 主要来自俄罗斯的移民侨汇是家庭收入的最大来源，也是国内需求的关键驱动力。

title.en: Hydropower investment
title.zh: 水电投资

desc.en: Tajikistan holds significant hydropower potential and pursues large infrastructure projects as a long-term economic strategy.
desc.zh: 塔吉克斯坦拥有丰富的水电潜力，并将大型基础设施项目作为长期经济战略加以推进。

title.en: Agriculture
title.zh: 农业

desc.en: Agriculture remains important for employment and rural livelihoods, though productivity is constrained by geography and limited capital.
desc.zh: 农业在就业和农村生计方面依然重要，但受地理条件和资本有限制约，生产率受限。

title.en: Narrow domestic capacity and external dependence
title.zh: 国内能力狭窄与外部依赖

desc.en: Tajikistan has one of the narrowest economic bases in the region, with persistent reliance on external income and support.
desc.zh: 塔吉克斯坦拥有本区域最狭窄的经济基础之一，长期依赖外部收入和支持。

title.en: A remittance-dependent Central Asian economy with hydropower ambitions
title.zh: 一个依赖侨汇并押注水电的中亚经济体

desc.en: Tajikistan is a small post-Soviet economy whose role is shaped by migrant income, hydropower strategy, and one of the narrowest domestic economic bases in the region.
desc.zh: 塔吉克斯坦是一个小型后苏联经济体，其角色由移民收入、水电战略以及本区域最狭窄的国内经济基础之一共同塑造。

title.en: Hydropower, mining, and project-driven inland economy
title.zh: 水电、矿业与项目驱动型内陆经济体

desc.en: Laos relies on electricity exports, mining, external financing, and regional connectivity, while debt pressure and a narrow domestic base remain major constraints.
desc.zh: 老挝依靠电力出口、矿业、外部融资和区域连接运转，而债务压力和狭窄的国内基础仍然是主要约束。

title.en: A small inland ASEAN energy-export economy
title.zh: 一个小型的东盟内陆能源出口经济体

desc.en: Laos is a small mainland Southeast Asian economy whose role is shaped by hydropower exports, external projects, and dependence on regional links.
desc.zh: 老挝是一个东南亚大陆小型经济体，其角色由水电出口、外部项目和对区域联系的依赖共同塑造。

title.en: Oil, gas, and small high-income hydrocarbon economy
title.zh: 石油、天然气与小型高收入油气经济体

desc.en: Brunei relies on hydrocarbons, fiscal buffers, and institutional stability, while diversification beyond oil and gas remains incomplete.
desc.zh: 文莱依靠油气、财政缓冲和制度稳定性运转，但摆脱油气依赖的多元化仍未完成。

title.en: A small high-income oil-and-gas state in Southeast Asia
title.zh: 一个东南亚小型高收入油气国家

desc.en: Brunei is a wealthy but narrow economy whose role is defined mainly by hydrocarbons and stability rather than by broad domestic economic depth.
desc.zh: 文莱是一个富裕但狭窄的经济体，其角色主要由油气和稳定性定义，而不是由宽广的国内经济厚度定义。

title.en: Petroleum fund, public spending, and small undiversified economy
title.zh: 石油基金、公共支出与小型未充分多元化经济体

desc.en: Timor-Leste relies on petroleum wealth, public expenditure, and a still-narrow non-oil economy, while long-term diversification remains unresolved.
desc.zh: 东帝汶依靠石油财富、公共支出和仍然狭窄的非油经济运转，而长期多元化问题尚未真正解决。

title.en: A small post-conflict Southeast Asian economy seeking a non-oil future
title.zh: 一个正在寻找非油未来的小型后冲突东南亚经济体

desc.en: Timor-Leste is a small new ASEAN economy whose role is shaped by petroleum wealth, state-building, and the search for a broader post-oil development model.
desc.zh: 东帝汶是一个新加入东盟的小型经济体，其角色由石油财富、国家建设以及对更宽后石油发展路径的探索共同塑造。

title.en: Tourism, external inflows, and small island Muslim economy
title.zh: 旅游、外部流入与小型岛屿穆斯林经济体

desc.en: Maldives relies on tourism, related services, and external financing, while fiscal and debt pressures remain its main structural risks.
desc.zh: 马尔代夫依靠旅游、相关服务和外部融资运转，而财政与债务压力仍然是它最主要的结构性风险。

title.en: A high-end tourism island economy in South Asia
title.zh: 一个高端旅游型南亚岛屿经济体

desc.en: Maldives is a small but globally visible island economy whose role is shaped by tourism, imported dependence, and macroeconomic fragility.
desc.zh: 马尔代夫是一个体量不大但全球辨识度很高的岛屿经济体，其角色由旅游、进口依赖和宏观脆弱性共同塑造。

title.en: Remittances, hydropower, and mountain landlocked economy
title.zh: 侨汇、水电与山地内陆经济体

desc.en: Nepal relies on remittances, agriculture, services, and hydropower expansion, while geography and limited domestic scale continue to constrain development.
desc.zh: 尼泊尔依靠侨汇、农业、服务业和水电扩张运转，而地理条件和有限的国内体量仍然限制着发展。

title.en: A remittance-dependent Himalayan economy
title.zh: 一个依赖侨汇的喜马拉雅经济体

desc.en: Nepal is a small South Asian mountain economy whose role is shaped by migration income, hydropower ambitions, and difficult geography.
desc.zh: 尼泊尔是一个小型南亚山地经济体，其角色由移民收入、水电雄心和困难地理条件共同塑造。

title.en: Hydropower, public investment, and small Himalayan economy
title.zh: 水电、公共投资与小型喜马拉雅经济体

desc.en: Bhutan relies on hydropower, tourism, and state-guided public spending, while small scale and concentration remain major structural limits.
desc.zh: 不丹依靠水电、旅游和国家引导的公共支出运转，而体量小和集中度高仍然是主要结构限制。

title.en: A small hydropower-based Himalayan state
title.zh: 一个以水电为基础的小型喜马拉雅国家

desc.en: Bhutan is a small South Asian mountain economy whose role is shaped by electricity exports, careful state direction, and a narrow but relatively stable development model.
desc.zh: 不丹是一个小型南亚山地经济体，其角色由电力出口、审慎的国家引导和较窄但相对稳定的发展模式共同塑造。

title.en: Finance, trade services, and global city gateway economy
title.zh: 金融、贸易服务与全球城市门户经济体

desc.en: Hong Kong relies on finance, business services, logistics, and gateway functions linking China with global capital and trade.
desc.zh: 香港依靠金融、商业服务、物流以及连接中国与全球资本和贸易的门户功能运转。

title.en: East Asia's financial gateway economy
title.zh: 东亚的金融门户经济体

desc.en: Hong Kong is one of Asia's most important financial and commercial nodes, shaped by service intensity and its intermediary role with mainland China.
desc.zh: 香港是亚洲最重要的金融和商业节点之一，其角色由高度服务化以及与中国内地之间的中介功能共同塑造。

title.en: Gaming, tourism, and highly concentrated service economy
title.zh: 博彩、旅游与高度集中的服务经济体

desc.en: Macao relies on casino gaming, tourism, hospitality, and visitor-related services, while economic concentration remains its defining structural risk.
desc.zh: 澳门依靠博彩、旅游、酒店和游客相关服务运转，而经济集中度过高仍然是它最核心的结构性风险。

title.en: East Asia's gaming-and-tourism service economy
title.zh: 东亚的博彩与旅游服务经济体

desc.en: Macao is one of the clearest examples in East Asia of a wealthy service economy built on gaming, visitor flows, and highly concentrated tourism exports.
desc.zh: 澳门是东亚最典型的高收入服务经济体之一，其角色由博彩、游客流量和高度集中的旅游出口共同塑造。

title.en: State control, isolation, and highly constrained political economy
title.zh: 国家控制、孤立与高度受限的政治经济体

desc.en: North Korea relies on centralized state direction and limited internal market activity, while isolation and weak transparency define the system's deepest constraints.
desc.zh: 朝鲜依靠高度集中的国家主导和有限的内部市场活动运转，而孤立和低透明度定义了这个系统最深层的约束。

title.en: A highly isolated East Asian special-case economy
title.zh: 一个高度孤立的东亚特殊案例经济体

desc.en: North Korea is a unique East Asian economic space whose role is shaped more by control and restricted external access than by normal market integration.
desc.zh: 朝鲜是一个特殊的东亚经济空间，其角色更多由控制和受限的外部接触塑造，而不是由正常市场整合定义。

title.en: Manufacturing, services, and U.S.-linked territorial economy
title.zh: 制造业、服务业与深度连向美国的属地经济体

desc.en: Puerto Rico relies on manufacturing, services, and federal integration with the United States, while demographic decline and fiscal dependence remain central long-term constraints.
desc.zh: 波多黎各依靠制造业、服务业和与美国的联邦整合运转，而人口下降和财政依赖仍然是核心长期约束。

title.en: An American territory in the Caribbean
title.zh: 加勒比海上的美国属地

desc.en: Puerto Rico is legally and economically tied to the United States, functioning as a Caribbean territory whose economic identity is defined by US institutional links, pharma exports, and ongoing fiscal adjustment.
desc.zh: 波多黎各在法律和经济上与美国紧密相连，作为一个加勒比属地，其经济身份由美国制度联系、制药出口和持续财政调整共同定义。

title.en: Fisheries, public support, and emerging Arctic mineral economy
title.zh: 渔业、公共支持与新兴北极矿产经济体

desc.en: Greenland relies on fisheries, a large public sector, Danish fiscal support, and growing mineral ambitions, while remoteness and very small scale remain fundamental constraints.
desc.zh: 格陵兰依靠渔业、庞大的公共部门、丹麦财政支持和不断上升的矿产开发雄心运转，而遥远性和极小体量仍然是根本约束。

title.en: A small Arctic North American economy under Danish sovereignty
title.zh: 一个处于丹麦王国主权之下的北美北极小型经济体

desc.en: Greenland is a geographically North American Arctic economy whose role is shaped by fisheries, strategic mineral potential, and political autonomy within the Kingdom of Denmark.
desc.zh: 格陵兰是一个在经济地理上属于北美北极的小型经济体，其角色由渔业、战略性矿产潜力以及在丹麦王国内的自治地位共同塑造。
